# neon_branch_neon_auth (Data Source)

Retrieves information about a NeonAuth integration on a branch.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "neon_branch_neon_auth" "example" {
  project_id = "your-project-id"
  branch_id  = "your-branch-id"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `branch_id` (String) The Neon branch ID.
- `project_id` (String) The Neon project ID.

### Read-Only

- `auth_provider` (String) The authentication provider.
- `auth_provider_project_id` (String) The auth provider project ID.
- `base_url` (String) The base URL for the NeonAuth integration.
- `created_at` (String) The creation timestamp.
- `db_name` (String) The database name used by the integration.
- `jwks_url` (String) The JWKS URL for the NeonAuth integration.
